pkgmetadata.longdescription: provides client and dns server scripts enabling clients to submit dynamic updates to their dns, in a dual-stack environment including both direct dnsmasq/radvd clients and openvpn clients

use.flag: install scripts and configs for ddns serverr
enable client support (direct or vpn) as appropriate
install ddns init script with daemon and updater for ddns client
(legacy mode)if direct client, install dhcpcd.ddns for client
if vpn client, install only dhcpcd config and neighbor discovery script
